title: FAuction
description: Auction plugin with full support of bungee
body:
# FAuction
FAuction is a 100% gui auction house management plugin. There is only one command. All gui are 100% configurable.

[Wiki](https://github.com/Florianpal1/FAuction/wiki) | [GitHub](https://github.com/Florianpal1/FAuction) | [Discord](https://discord.com/invite/dEvR34ZzYQ)

## Support :
- https://discord.com/invite/dEvR34ZzYQ
- Discord code : dEvR34ZzYQ

## Features :
- Full language customization
- Used Aikar Commands
- Modded or Custom item support
- Fully Customisable Gui
- Bungeecord duplication protection
- Auction limitation
- Customisable filter system
- Configurable minimum and maximum price per item (support Shulker)
- Shulker/Barrel visualization
- Historic

Gui Translation : https://github.com/Florianpal1/FAuctionUI

## Custom Configuration :
All gui are configurable, you can make your own gui with custom head texture and customModelData.

Custom head texture is only available for Paper server.

For more detail see the documentation : [Gui Configuration](https://github.com/Florianpal1/FAuction/wiki/Gui-Configuration)

## Dependency :
- Java 8
- Vault
- SQL Server or SQLite
- Permission plugin like LuckPerms

## Installation :
- Put the jar file in plugins of all server
- Configure the database.yml for MySQL (on same database for all server, if you have one server SQLite is enough) more information here


## Server that uses FAuction :
- Sunaris : play.sunaris.fr (French server in 1.21.X)
